title: Amber
body:
# This Mod Adds 
- 8 Custom Music Disc
- 4 Structures
- 5 Random Items
- 2 Entities
- 2 Achievements
- 1 Command (/ziggyarmy)
- 1 Armor Set
- 1 Sword Tool
- 1 Axe Tool
- 1 Pickaxe Tool
- 1 Shovel Tool





# Recipes

- Zarnite Sword



![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5f91f95bf27ca929a130467d9681cf1c00e8fb6.png)
- Zarnite Axe



![Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccce8cb5e77b0ce9397d7444aa75c5f848a08a7f.png)
- Zarnite Pickaxe



![Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e30de748f549800938653a12c5c0f7f685436992.png)
- Zarnite Shovel



![Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e288210163fcfe010a1d78e4b8af3d33661d9e.png)
- Zarnite Helmet



![ZarHelm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc27a8701391f71ec6e0702b9f3265c84180405.png)
- Zarnite Chestplate



![ZarChest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0801c19394222b4ef7949d4f585d15a33bad8d.png)

![ZarLegs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a242ded57b52822e8ddc2921220452ca81d10c23.png)
- Zarnite Boots



![ZarBoots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52bacc715589023abf43241a36f03078e506e078.png)
- Mayo



![Mayo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dcb66db83fe0a5c34d23ad6b4e647d16aea96aa.png)
- Jaw Exercise Block



![JawRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93b168bb198af80eac37434e97f1db78b1624f13.png)


   The Rest Of The Recipes You Have To See For Yourself
